strongestIdea: A production-safe prop grammar for threshold-keeper Otis: bell, keycard, ledger, and tablet each get specific pose jobs, with one active prop per sprite and hand-safe interactions.
uniquenessClaim: This lane does not redesign Otis or chase more visual detail; it stress-tests the prop layer that could break the approved soft Santa concierge identity through clutter, bad hands, belly occlusion, or hotel-clip-art signals.
qualityRisks: Bell poses are high-risk for broken hand anatomy unless the bell is supported on a ledge or tray.
Keycards become clutter if generated with keyrings, lanyards, badges, readable text, barcodes, or QR codes.
Ledger and tablet props can hide Otis's slight belly if centered across the torso.
Tablet screens can pull attention from Otis's face if they contain bright or readable UI.
This lane produced prompt artifacts only; no image source preflight was possible.
fallbackReason: The requested GPT-5.5 fast mode with extra-high reasoning and local GPT Image 2 file generation were not exposed in this Codex runtime, so the lane produced concrete prompt packets, a shot matrix, and QA guard artifacts.
promotionBlockers: No local generated image files exist from this lane.
No native 4K source image preflight was run.
No transparency, alpha-edge, derivative, or app-scale QA exists yet.
Coordinator must generate probes with the approved Otis reference attached and obtain final approval before promotion.
